title: Abyss Revamp
description: A Water & Abyss themed 1.8.9 pvp pack made for bedwars & skywars !
body:
The Abyss Revamp is a texture pack themed around an old unfinished pack from Akooa.


As the name suggest, it is themed arround water & abyss, having a cyan color as well as some brown touches.


It is made for 1.8.9, and can be used overall even though it is mainly made for pvp gamemodes such as bedwars and skywars.


It also includes custom skys as well as custom sounds but these only works if you're using an Optifine client !


Here are some screenshots to showcase the texture pack :)


![Abyss 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ac42d16d66f4295322c15cdd3f65ad49ad116d0.jpeg)

![Abyss 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8df2765df9e99a93d472ce2ac722da7e1eec573a.jpeg)

![Abyss 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64b2ae66030d7ea5221594c97e3e882a3b3fb0e1.jpeg)


Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Texture pack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Textures not working properly, Sky glitches and/or not rendering...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
